publishedAbstract: - ODF upgrade from 4.18 to 4.19 fails to complete.- StorageCluster is stuck in `Progressing` state.- `NooBaa` CR is stuck in `Creating` state with condition: `cnpg cluster is not ready`.- CloudNativePG (CNPG) import pods noobaa-db-pg-cluster-*-import-* are in a failure loop.- CNPG cluster status remains in `Importing`.- PostgreSQL failure in import pod logs: ~~~ 20XX-XX-24 12:33:30.938 UTC [26] LOG: 0 8kB is outside the valid range for parameter "shared_buffers" (16.. 1073741823) 20XX-XX-24 12:33:30.939 UTC [26] FATAL: configuration file "/var/lib/postgresql/data/pgdata/custom.conf" contains errors ~~~
publishedTitle: ODF 4.19 upgrade fails with - LOG:  0 8kB is outside the valid range for parameter "shared_buffers"
